description.claude: All TypeScript code must have strict typings. The use of `any` is strictly prohibited. Prefer `unknown` if the type is truly dynamic, and use proper type narrowing or generics.
description.cursor: All TypeScript code must have strict typings. The use of `any` is strictly prohibited. Prefer `unknown` if the type is truly dynamic, and use proper type narrowing or generics.
